general.name: General Store
general.description: Sells supplies, tools, and everyday adventuring gear.

guild.name: Guild Hall
guild.description: Specialised equipment and services for guild members.

healing.name: Healing Counter
healing.description: A temple healer who mends flesh, restores the arcane, purges poison, and — for a price — returns the dead to life.

services.name: Heal All HP
services.description: Restore every living member to full hit points.

services.name: Restore All MP
services.description: Refill every living member's magic points.

services.name: Cure All Poisons
services.description: Cleanse poison from every party member.

services.name: Raise Dead
services.description: Return a fallen ally to full health. Costly miracle.

inn.name: Inn
inn.description: Offers rest and refreshment for weary travelers.

magic.name: Magic Shop
magic.description: Sells scrolls, potions, and enchanted goods.

reagent.name: Reagent Shop
reagent.description: Sells magical reagents and alchemical ingredients.

weapon.name: Weapons Shop
weapon.description: Sells melee and ranged weapons for all classes.
